commands.name: lint
commands.description: Validate a root Ghost fingerprint package, fingerprint.yml, checks.yml, or legacy markdown — defaults to .ghost

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

options.name: all
options.description: Validate every nested fingerprint package and its resolved fingerprint stack

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for --all and default package lookup (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a root .ghost fingerprint package (fingerprint.yml and checks.yml)

options.name: scope
options.description: Create a scoped <path>/<memory-dir> fingerprint package

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for init --scope or default root init (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: withIntent
options.description: Also create optional intent.md for human-authored or human-approved intent

options.name: withConfig
options.description: Also create optional config.yml for implementation roots and reference registries/libraries

options.name: reference
options.description: Reference UI registry, library path, or fingerprint to record in config.yml and inventory building blocks

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify a root Ghost fingerprint package: prose/composition evidence, inventory exemplars, and checks are grounded.

options.name: root
options.description: Optional target root used to resolve fingerprint.yml evidence and exemplar paths (default: cwd)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

options.name: all
options.description: Verify every nested fingerprint package and its resolved fingerprint stack

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for --all and default package lookup (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Report fingerprint layer readiness: produced artifacts, useful prose/inventory/composition, and the next BYOA step.

options.name: includeScopes
options.description: Also report per-scope survey and fingerprint artifacts under modules/<scope>/ and fingerprints/<scope>.md

options.name: includeNested
options.description: Also list nested fingerprint packages and readiness

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for nested discovery and default scan (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: stack
commands.description: Inspect the nested Ghost fingerprint stack for one or more repo paths.

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for stack discovery (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: inventory
commands.description: Emit deterministic raw signals about a frontend repo as JSON for optional cache/source material: package manifests, language histogram, candidate config files, registry presence, top-level tree, and git remote.

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Print a section map of intent.md or a direct fingerprint markdown file (line ranges + token estimates).

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Legacy direct markdown diff between two fingerprint.md files — what decisions, palette roles, and tokens changed (text-level, NOT embedding distance; for that, use `ghost compare`).

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: survey
commands.description: Legacy/cache helpers for ghost.survey/v2 files. Ops: merge, fix-ids, summarize, catalog, patterns.

options.name: out
options.description: Write the result to this path (default: stdout)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: summarize/catalog use markdown or json; patterns use yaml, json, or markdown

options.name: kind
options.description: survey catalog filter: include only this value kind

options.name: budget
options.description: survey summarize budget: compact, standard, full

commands.name: emit
commands.description: Emit a derived artifact from the fingerprint package (review command or context-bundle generation packet)

options.name: path
options.description: Resolve a nested fingerprint stack for this repo path

options.name: package
options.description: Use exactly this fingerprint package directory instead of resolving a stack

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for --path stack resolution (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: out
options.description: Output path (review-command → .claude/commands/design-review.md; context-bundle → ghost-context/)

options.name: stdout
options.description: Write to stdout instead of a file (review-command only)

options.name: readme
options.description: Include README.md (context-bundle)

options.name: promptOnly
options.description: Emit only prompt.md (context-bundle generation packet)

options.name: name
options.description: Override the skill name (default: fingerprint.yml product or first scope) (context-bundle)

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare two or more fingerprints or root .ghost bundles. N=2 returns a pairwise delta; N≥3 returns a composite fingerprint.

options.name: semantic
options.description: Qualitative diff of decisions + palette (N=2 only)

options.name: temporal
options.description: Add velocity, trajectory, and ack bounds (N=2, reads .ghost/history.jsonl)

options.name: historyDir
options.description: Directory containing .ghost/history.jsonl (for --temporal, defaults to cwd)

options.name: gate
options.description: Reconcile against a sync manifest and emit a structured pass/fail verdict (N=2 only)

options.name: sync
options.description: Sync manifest path for --gate (default: ./.ghost-sync.json)

options.name: maxDivergenceDays
options.description: For --gate: flag diverging dimensions older than this many days as uncovered

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: ack
commands.description: Acknowledge current drift — record intentional stance toward the tracked fingerprint

options.name: config
options.description: Path to ghost config file

options.name: dimension
options.description: Acknowledge a specific dimension only

options.name: stance
options.description: Stance: aligned, accepted, or diverging

options.name: reason
options.description: Reason for this acknowledgment

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: track
commands.description: Track another fingerprint as this repo's reference

options.name: dimension
options.description: Track only for a specific dimension

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: diverge
commands.description: Declare intentional divergence on a dimension

options.name: config
options.description: Path to ghost config file

options.name: reason
options.description: Why this dimension is intentionally diverging

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: skill
commands.description: Install the unified Ghost skill bundle.

options.name: dest
options.description: Install destination (default: detected agent skills directory + /ghost)

options.name: agent
options.description: Agent destination to use when --dest is omitted: claude, cursor, codex, opencode

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite an existing installed Ghost skill

commands.name: check
commands.description: Run active ghost.checks/v2 gates from the resolved fingerprint stack against a git diff.

options.name: base
options.description: Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)

options.name: diff
options.description: Unified diff file to check instead of running git diff. Use '-' for stdin.

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory; bypasses stack discovery

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for stack discovery (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: review
commands.description: Emit an evidence-routed advisory review prompt from the fingerprint package and a git diff.

options.name: base
options.description: Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)

options.name: diff
options.description: Unified diff file to review instead of running git diff. Use '-' for stdin.

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory; bypasses stack discovery

options.name: memoryDir
options.description: Relative fingerprint package directory for stack discovery (flag name retained; default: .ghost)

options.name: includeMemory
options.description: Include accepted decisions as accepted_decisions in the advisory packet (flag name retained).

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: members
commands.description: List registered fleet members and their freshness — one row per (map.md, fingerprint.md) subdirectory.

options.name: json
options.description: Output JSON (one object per member) instead of a table

commands.name: view
commands.description: Compute the fleet's pairwise distances, group-by tables, and tracks-graph; emit fleet.md + fleet.json into <dir>/reports/.

options.name: id
options.description: Override the fleet id (default: directory basename slug)

options.name: out
options.description: Reports directory (default: <dir>/reports)

commands.name: emit
commands.description: Emit the ghost-fleet agentskills.io bundle (kind: skill).

options.name: out
options.description: Output directory (default: .claude/skills/ghost-fleet)
